backend.changelog: Fixes downloads going to the browser Downloads folder (and PDFs opening) right after an update: the download folder is now always a real folder chosen via the CAD Bridge agent and is remembered across restarts. Pick a folder once and deliveries go straight there.

cadBridge.changelog: Resolve virtual components by their stable child name so STEP and 3D PDF are produced for them (fixes the in-session vs BOM parent-name mismatch that left them missing on a fresh cache).
